{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Trainer Mura’s Presence
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Trainer Mura]]'s [[Presence]] is a featureless gray doll.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
